description: Evidence reference for local proof. V1 carries paths, hashes or path-only markers, reasons, and confidence. Evidence snippets are not supported.

evidence_type.description: Tool-defined evidence category, such as contract_file, package_script, skill_file, generated_artifact, or secret_path.

path.description: Normalized path relative to the target project, using / separators. Absolute paths, drive-letter paths, and backslashes are not valid evidence paths.

path_only.description: True for secret-like or otherwise unreadable evidence. Path-only evidence must not include content hashes or snippets.

reason.description: Short explanation of why this source was cited.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash for readable evidence. Do not hash secret-like file contents for path-only evidence.

unknown_detail.description: Required when confidence is unknown and useful when a stale fact needs explanation.

title: Review Packet Evidence Reference
